_comment: Fill one of `orcid` OR `openalex_author_id` (orcid preferred). Edit `selected` to pick papers and order; match papers by DOI (preferred), openalex id, or arxiv id. Use `overrides` to add project-page / code / slides links to any paper.

extras._comment: Manual items here if OpenAlex misses something (preprints sometimes). Match schema of data/publications.json.works entries.
